body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
This PR refactor ClimaLandSimulations code to use functions instead of include(path). This does not change the functionality. #456 

## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->
unresolved comments from last PR #441 :
- [x] functions instead of include
- [x] all sites (not just ozark) - need to update!
- [x] inputs and outputs DataFrame with Unitful should be outside of `fluxnet_simulation()` (for speed and maybe GPU compatibility)
- [x] Fluxnet module 
- [x] Allow changing 1 param (e.g., `fluxnet_simulation("US-MOz"; params = ozark_default_params(; hetero_resp = hetero_resp_ozark(; b = 2)))`) --- done 
- [ ] lib/ClimaLandSimulations/src/fluxnet_simulation.jl around line 266, why the +40? (this is in experiment/integrated as well)
```drivers.TA.values[1 + Int(round(t0 / DATA_DT))] + 40# Get soil temperature at t0```
- [ ] add tests for utilities (e.g., `getoutput`, `data_tools.jl`, etc)
- [ ] lib/ClimaLandSimulations/src/utilities/climalsm_output_dataframe.jl and others files, avoid hard-coding values
- [ ] lib/ClimaLandSimulations/src/utilities/inputs_dataframe.jl do we always have all variables from fluxnet input files? (note: I think so, even if there are -9999 they should be there - if not we can create it)
- [ ] Should LAI, RAI, plant_\nu be in met_drivers?
- [ ] Check that buildkite figures are similar to experiment, when it is, remove experiment folder
- [ ] Add modularity as an arg, for example, `fluxnet_simulation("US-MOz", conductance = Medlyn)`
- [ ] Make the list of parameters shorter (use more default values or constants)

## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->


<!---
Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

----
- [x] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: ClimaLandSimulations: use functions instead of includes
